videos.title: iOS 26.5 - The Deep Dive!
videos.description:
Apple takes big steps in iOS 26.5, introducing end-to-end encryption for RCS, a feature that's still in beta but promises increased security for messaging. Jeff dives into other new updates, like the controversial upcoming ads in Apple Maps, improved subscription options for App Store apps, and advanced notifications controls for FaceTime calls from unknown numbers. Tune in to discover how these changes can enhance your iPhone experience and keep your data more secure!
